title: Pollichia amplexicaulis
taxonomy: Pollichia amplexicaulis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region, including Spain, France, and Italy. The exact classification of Pollichia amplexicaulis is within the subfamily Apioideae. The plant is further classified within the tribe Apieae and is closely related to other species in the same family. Further research may be necessary to confirm its specific classification within the plant kingdom.
